title: short weapons
description: A clean texture pack that shortens all Minecraft swords for better visibility sleeker combat and more.
body: The Short Weapons Texture Pack is a clean and minimalist resource pack that shortens all Minecraft sword textures for better visibility, sleeker combat, and a more refined look. Whether you're battling mobs, building intricate structures, or engaging in PvP, this pack helps declutter your screen and sharpen your focus.
